changeSet.author: shaxzod

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname IN ('uk_product_categories_name', 'product_categories_name_key') ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE public.product_categories DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS uk_product_categories_name; ALTER TABLE public.product_categories DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS product_categories_name_key;
